pi_items.source: Verified against task description requiring save as 'Category_Narrative' and standard OAD file extension .dva.
Verified against task description explicitly requiring a 'Language Narrative' visualization.
Verified against task description explicitly stating to drag 'Sales' and 'Profit' measures.
Verified against task description explicitly stating to drag 'Product Category' dimension.
Verified via OAD default save behavior and expected filename in this environment's Windows system (C:\\Users\\Docker\\Documents\\).

privileged_info_summary: The correct execution creates a 'Category_Narrative.dva' workbook saved in the standard Windows Documents folder. The workbook must contain a Language Narrative visualization analyzing 'Sales' and 'Profit' by 'Product Category' from the synthetic Sample Order Lines dataset.
